tracks.speechText: Turn any idea into a complete Coh-dex theme. This Build Week release brings decks themes, a theme studio and community, directly into the conversation. I asked for Argentina football at night, and named it ahl-byah-SOOL Afterglow.
decks themes creates a validated dark and light pair, then previews the full workspace, not just swatches. I can check code, diffs, and contrast, then apply it with no account.
The plugin makes the catalog conversational: search Coh-dex, decks themes, and community themes, compare full previews, and see what is trending today, this week, this month, or all time.
GIT-hub sign-in appears only when I publish. I review the name and both variants, approve the public action, and keep verified creator credit.
Creators get one dashboard for themes, ranks, repeat daily and weekly wins, and the complete achievement collection. Stats accumulate; each achievement reward unlocks once.
Because decks themes is open source, users can turn reviewed feedback into a GIT-hub issue, without anything posting automatically.
G P T five point six interprets the creative intent. The M C P server validates names, colors, identity, and public actions. The visual app keeps every preview and decision in context.
Personal themes, community discovery, and creator recognition, all in one Coh-dex conversation. decks themes is open source and built for the community.
